flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Madison Area Technical College fell 23% between 2006 and 2009 (69.0% → 53.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Madison Area Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Madison Area Technical College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (23.9% → 28.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Madison Area Technical College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (8.5k → 10.1k).
